$comment: Expected QCFlag output for mini_invalid.csv validated against mini.schema.json (schema engine only). Authored in P02 from architecture.md §5 and json-schema-subsystem.md §D templates; structural fields (ruleId, scope, row, column, severity, value) are ground truth, message strings may be refined by P08/P09 when the translator lands. Rows are 0-based __row__ over data rows (header excluded).

flags.message: 'X99' does not match the expected format (pattern ^R[0-9]{3}$).
150 exceeds the maximum 100 — expected an integer 18–100, or a missing-value code (-777 Refused, -888 Don't know).
1.5 exceeds the maximum 1 — expected a number 0–1, or a missing-value code (-777 Refused).
5 is not an allowed value — expected one of: 0 No; 1 Yes; -777 Refused.
when consent = 0, score must be -777 (Refused). Found 0.5. [Schema note: Skip pattern: records without consent carry the refused sentinel in score.]
value is missing — this variable is required for every record.
Column 'notes' is not defined in the schema, which does not allow unexpected variables.
Rows 8 and 9 are identical records — the schema requires all records to be unique.
